MAP.COMMENT: --- If challenge id is already present in DB do nothing ---

INVOKE.COMMENT: call challenges table to get code

check size

MAP.COMMENT: -- Map challengeId in the Social Interaction doc ---

INVOKE.NAME: $default

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

BRANCH.COMMENT: --- VE-1274 Calculate cutOffDate for member only if SI is of type Group ---

SEQUENCE.NAME: GROUP
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: --- VE-1242 cutOff date for Member which will be EffFrom of the member when member is added to Team ---

BRANCH.COMMENT: check status of springboot api call

SEQUENCE.NAME: %responseListSize%>0&&%results/status%=='200'
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: if api call is success and challenge periods exists

MAP.COMMENT: compare current date to challenge periods effective dates

BRANCH.COMMENT: check compared dates to determine current periods

MAP.NAME: %effDateCompChallengePeriodEffFromDate%='1'&&%effDateCompChallengePeriodEffToDate%='-1'
MAP.COMMENT: effective date is within the challenge period effective dates

MAP.NAME: %effDateCompChallengePeriodEffFromDate%='0'||%effDateCompChallengePeriodEffToDate%='0'
MAP.COMMENT: effective date is on challenge period effective dates

BRANCH.COMMENT: check current challengePeriods
check challengeSocialRs/changesCutOffEffectiveDayforAdding

MAP.COMMENT: map cutoffDay as effective request date
compare current date to cutoff date

BRANCH.COMMENT: check compared dated to determine cutoff date

MAP.NAME: %effDateCompCutoffDay%='-1'||%effDateCompCutoffDay%='0'
MAP.COMMENT: effective date is before or equals to cutoff date

MAP.NAME: %effDateCompCutoffDay%='1'
MAP.COMMENT: effective date is after cutoff date

INVOKE.NAME: $default
INVOKE.COMMENT: cutoffDay cannot be determined, throw error

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

MAP.COMMENT: compare current date to cutoff date

BRANCH.COMMENT: check compared dated to determine cutoff date

MAP.NAME: %effDateCompCutoffDay%='-1'||%effDateCompCutoffDay%='0'
MAP.COMMENT: effective date is before or equals to cutoff date

MAP.NAME: %effDateCompCutoffDay%='1'
MAP.COMMENT: effective date is after cutoff date

INVOKE.NAME: $default
INVOKE.COMMENT: cutoffDay cannot be determined, throw error

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

INVOKE.NAME: $default
INVOKE.COMMENT: current period dosen't exists, throw error

SEQUENCE.NAME: %challengeSocialEligibilityResponse/eligibilityDetails[0]/social[0]/socialInteractionParticipantsRemaining%>0 && %challengeSocialEligibilityResponse/eligibilityDetails[0]/social[0]/socialQuantityRemaining%>0 && %challengeSocialRs/reciprocalAcceptanceRequired%=='TRUE'
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: -- Create Social Interaction with Invitee Name --
